name: Yogurt-Shrimp Spread
recipeIngredient: 4 1/2 oz Small shrimp, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except shrimp thoroughly.
2. Coarsely chop the shrimp.
3. Stir the chopped shrimp into the cheese mixture.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.
5. Serve with bran snack toast if desired.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
